name: ASUS PRIME B650M-A AX Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-6400+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB4 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - Killer 2.5GbE LAN - Killer 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6 - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C Front Connector

description: ASUS Prime B650M-A AX Micro-ATX motherboard for AM5 socket with DDR5 support, PCIe 5.0, and USB4.
